title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Amazon India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Amazon India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Amazon India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Amazon India:
Amazon India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India!
